areas.name: Health
areas.description: Conditions, regimes, therapies, treatments, medicines, diet, exercise

areas.name: Wealth
areas.description: Accounts, financial assets, institutions, financial documents, reviews

areas.name: Learning
areas.description: Subjects, courses, lessons, concepts, skills, abilities

areas.name: Family
areas.description: Family people, interactions, documents, decisions, notes

areas.name: Work
areas.description: Ventures, functions, projects, workstreams, teams, organisations, people, documents

propertyRegistry.name: areas
propertyRegistry.description: Connects cross-cutting object to multiple areas.

propertyRegistry.name: people
propertyRegistry.description: Generic people relation; use more specific relation where possible.

propertyRegistry.name: financial-asset
propertyRegistry.description: Financial asset relation. Replaces old asset relation.

propertyRegistry.name: file
propertyRegistry.description: LSS File wrapper relation, not Logseq built-in #Asset.

propertyRegistry.name: Status
propertyRegistry.description: Native Logseq task status for ActionItem when native task mode is enabled.

propertyRegistry.name: Priority
propertyRegistry.description: Native Logseq task priority for ActionItem when native task mode is enabled.

propertyRegistry.name: Deadline
propertyRegistry.description: Native Logseq deadline for task-backed ActionItem.

propertyRegistry.name: Scheduled
propertyRegistry.description: Native Logseq scheduled date for task-backed ActionItem.

propertyRegistry.name: follow-up-date
propertyRegistry.description: Date field for follow up date.

propertyRegistry.name: status
propertyRegistry.description: LSS lifecycle state for non-task objects. Use native Status only for task-backed #ActionItem.

propertyRegistry.name: priority
propertyRegistry.description: LSS priority for non-task objects. #ActionItem should use native Priority when native task mode is enabled.

propertyRegistry.name: confidentiality
propertyRegistry.description: Sensitivity classification used by audits and exports.

propertyRegistry.name: review-scope
propertyRegistry.description: Auto-registered from object type properties: review-scope. Review manually before production.

propertyAliases.reason: Avoid conflict with Logseq built-in #Asset tag.
Use native Logseq task Deadline for task-backed actions.
Use native Logseq task Priority for task-backed actions.
Use native Logseq task Status for task-backed actions.

auditRules.title: Schema pages carry required schema metadata
auditRules.condition: Every Entity-Page, Form, Dashboard and Word Extender schema page must have expected tag and metadata.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Scan pages under Entity-Page/, Form/, Dashboard/, Word Extender/ and verify tag + instance-tag/template/node-kind/dashboard-section/status/schema-version.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Create or update schema page metadata from registry.
acceptanceCriteria: No active schema page lacks instance-tag, template, status, schema-version, and node-kind.

auditRules.title: Every registered tag exists
auditRules.condition: Every base/entity/form/word extender tag in the registry must exist as a Logseq DB tag.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Use getAllTags/createTag equivalence; compare tag names.
acceptanceCriteria: All registry tags are present.

auditRules.title: Entity tag properties are not configured on native tags
auditRules.condition: DB entity tags must not include LSS object schema properties; properties are materialized on entity pages only.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: For each tag, verify native Tag Properties does not include registry object properties.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Remove registry object properties from the native tag property list; keep class tags and entity page properties.
acceptanceCriteria: Tagging a journal block with an LSS entity tag does not display schema properties on the journal block.

auditRules.title: Required properties are not empty
auditRules.condition: Every tagged node must have non-empty required property values (sourced exclusively from the RegistryObject for that tag).
auditRules.detectionStrategy: For each tagged node, resolve RegistryObject by #tag (primary) or lss-object-type, then inspect its requiredProperties list. Template bodies contribute zero schema.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Prompt user or insert empty property placeholders; auto-fill safe defaults only. Run repair to ensure full set from tag.
acceptanceCriteria: No active instance has missing required properties.

auditRules.title: Node properties use node references
auditRules.condition: Node-typed properties must reference nodes, not plain text.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Inspect property values for node identity/reference shape; flag scalar strings where node expected.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Offer conversion candidates, never infer silently.
acceptanceCriteria: No node property contains plain text where a node reference is required.

auditRules.title: Node property targets have allowed tags
auditRules.condition: Node property values must point to nodes carrying one of the configured target tags.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: For each node property, resolve target node and inspect tags, including child tags.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Suggest target tag addition or replacement node.
acceptanceCriteria: All node references satisfy allowed target tags.

auditRules.title: Wealth Asset does not collide with built-in #Asset
auditRules.condition: LSS must use #FinancialAsset for wealth assets; #Asset is reserved for Logseq assets.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Find #Asset instances used with wealth fields or schema pages named Entity-Page/Asset.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Migrate schema and instances to #FinancialAsset; preserve built-in assets untouched.
acceptanceCriteria: No LSS wealth object uses #Asset as its type.

auditRules.title: ActionItem uses native task fields consistently
auditRules.condition: When nativeTaskMode is true, #ActionItem should use Status/Priority/Deadline/Scheduled and avoid duplicate lowercase equivalents.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Find #ActionItem nodes with status/priority/due or duplicate Status/status fields.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Migrate status→Status, priority→Priority, due→Deadline according to mapping.
acceptanceCriteria: No #ActionItem carries duplicate task fields.

auditRules.title: Real objects are not stored as namespace folders
auditRules.condition: Instance pages should use clean names plus tags, not Project/<name> folder pages.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Scan namespaces that match object type names and contain instance-like pages.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Dry-run rename to clean page name and add DB tag; detect conflicts first.
acceptanceCriteria: No instance-like Project/, Person/, Asset/ pages remain without explicit exception.

auditRules.title: Dashboards use query-backed sections
auditRules.condition: Dashboard sections must contain queries/views, not hand-maintained copied result lists.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Compare dashboard sections to registry; detect ordinary link lists under managed section headings.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Insert missing query sections; move unmanaged lists into snapshot/archive if user confirms.
acceptanceCriteria: Every active dashboard section is query-backed.

auditRules.title: Templates exist as #Template blocks
auditRules.condition: Every active object type has a template block tagged #Template.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Scan Template/* pages for a block carrying #Template and expected child structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Every object type has an active template.

auditRules.title: Templates contain required sections
auditRules.condition: Template body should contain required operational sections.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Compare template child headings with templateRegistry.requiredSections.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Insert missing headings at end of template block.
acceptanceCriteria: No template misses a required section.

auditRules.title: Abbreviation triggers are unique
auditRules.suggestedFix: Ask user to retire or rename conflicting trigger.
acceptanceCriteria: No two active abbreviations share the same trigger.

auditRules.title: Sensitive objects have confidentiality
auditRules.condition: Health, Wealth, Person, Organisation, Document, File and Output objects must carry confidentiality where configured.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Scan types with confidentiality in properties and ensure value exists.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Set default based on tag-level policy or ask user for classification.
acceptanceCriteria: No sensitive object lacks confidentiality.

auditRules.title: Export respects privacy policy
auditRules.condition: Export commands must compute exclusion/redaction before writing report output.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Simulate export profile and record included/excluded/redacted counts before output.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Abort export or require explicit confirmation when sensitive data would be included.
acceptanceCriteria: Every export report includes a manifest of redactions and exclusions.

auditRules.title: Deprecated property aliases are migrated
auditRules.condition: Deprecated aliases should be converted to canonical property names in the applicable scope.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Compare propertyAliases registry to graph properties.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Run Normalize Properties dry run and apply only confirmed changes.
acceptanceCriteria: No deprecated aliases remain except approved legacy fields.

auditRules.title: Bidirectionality is only enabled on structural relations
auditRules.condition: Only approved node properties should be bidirectional.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Inspect tag bidirectional settings and compare with registry.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Enable/disable bidirectionality according to registry, after confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: No noisy generic properties are bidirectional.

auditRules.title: Graph schema version matches plugin registry
auditRules.condition: Graph LSS schema version must be compatible with plugin registry.
auditRules.detectionStrategy: Read LSS Schema page version and compare semver with plugin registry.
auditRules.suggestedFix: Run Upgrade Schema or refuse destructive commands.
acceptanceCriteria: Plugin refuses writes against incompatible major versions.

migrations.title: Normalize Cross-Area to Area/Cross-Cutting
migrations.detectionStrategy: Find property values and schema metadata equal to Cross-Area.
steps: Replace Cross-Area references in schema pages and object properties.
migrations.rollback: Restore previous property values from migration report.

migrations.title: Move wealth Asset schema to FinancialAsset
migrations.detectionStrategy: Find #Asset instances with wealth fields such as account, valuation-date, asset-type.
steps: Rename Entity-Page/Asset to Entity-Page/FinancialAsset if no conflict.
Do not touch Logseq built-in asset nodes unless they have wealth fields.
migrations.rollback: Retag affected nodes back to #Asset and restore old property names from report.

migrations.title: Convert namespaced object pages to clean tagged pages
migrations.from: Instance pages such as Project/Website Redesign.
migrations.detectionStrategy: Scan namespaces that match object types and identify leaves with object-like fields.
steps: Detect page type from namespace root.
Check for title conflict by tag.
Move namespace prefix into migration-note if useful.
migrations.rollback: Rename back to original page name and remove added tag.

migrations.title: Resolve WorkStream entity/form collision
migrations.to: Durable object stays #WorkStream; capture form becomes #WorkStreamUpdate.
migrations.detectionStrategy: Find #WorkStream nodes that are blocks or carry update fields date/blockers/next-actions.

migrations.title: Convert text relationship values to node references
migrations.from: Node properties contain text values like owner:: Ashutosh.
migrations.to: Node properties reference nodes like owner:: [[Ashutosh Mahindru]].
migrations.detectionStrategy: Find node-typed properties where value is scalar text, not node identity/reference.
steps: Search candidate target nodes by exact/alias/fuzzy match.
Create missing target node only with explicit confirmation.
Replace scalar text with node reference.
migrations.rollback: Restore original scalar property values from report.

migrations.title: Standardize ActionItem task fields
steps: Map status values to native Status.
Map priority values to native Priority.
Preserve old fields in migration report.
Remove old fields only after successful write.
migrations.rollback: Restore status/priority/due and remove native fields where they were created by migration.

migrations.title: Normalize deprecated property aliases
migrations.from: Deprecated property names appear in instances.
migrations.to: Canonical property names from propertyAliases registry.
migrations.detectionStrategy: Scan all nodes for deprecated properties.
steps: Copy value to canonical property if empty.
If canonical has value, flag conflict.
Remove deprecated property only after confirmation.
migrations.rollback: Restore deprecated property values from report.

migrations.title: Install missing query-backed dashboard shells
migrations.from: Dashboards absent or contain static sections.
migrations.to: Dashboard sections match Dashboard registry and Query/View definitions.
steps: Insert query-intent comments or plugin-generated query blocks.
Mark generated block with lss-managed:: true.
migrations.rollback: Remove blocks created by migration UUIDs from report.

migrations.title: Install missing templates
migrations.detectionStrategy: Compare template registry with graph templates.
steps: Disable Apply template to tags for DB page entities; materialize templates onto entity pages.
migrations.rollback: Delete created template blocks/pages if no user edits detected.

migrations.title: Apply confidentiality defaults
migrations.detectionStrategy: Find objects whose tag policy requires confidentiality and value is missing.
steps: Set default by tag policy: Health=medical, Wealth=financial, Person/Family=private, Work=internal.
migrations.rollback: Remove confidentiality values added by migration if still unchanged.

migrations.title: Add Output object family
migrations.from: Outputs stored as generic documents/notes only.
migrations.detectionStrategy: Find Document/Note pages with output-type or title prefixes Proposal/Report/SOP/Essay.
migrations.rollback: Remove created output tags/templates only if no instances created.

preflightRules.check: redaction manifest generated before file write

pluginCommands.name: LSS: Initialize Schema
acceptanceCriteria: Returns structured CommandResult with issues/warnings/actions.
Writes an audit or command report when mutations occur.
Does not make the graph dependent on plugin-owned hidden state.

testFixtures.purpose: Verify Initialize Schema creates root pages, tags, properties, templates and schema pages.
Minimal happy-path graph for audit baseline.
Ensure required property audit catches empty fields.
Detect owner/client/etc. values that should be node references.
Ensure Node properties point to allowed tags.
Ensure wealth assets are not modeled as #Asset.
Detect duplicate task fields and migrate to native Status/Priority/Deadline.
Ensure export preflight redacts sensitive contact/health/wealth fields.
